overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through Night City's dense urban downtown at night. The journey traverses neon-lit streets, covered underpasses, and elevated highways with prominent Japanese and English signage, showcasing the game's futuristic architecture and atmospheric ray-traced lighting.

events.description: driving beneath large concrete overpass into covered roadway section
ambient light dims as vehicle enters shadow of overpass structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through illuminated city intersection and entering covered roadway beneath overpass

notable_agents.action: car ahead with red taillights driving under the overpass

entered.detail: large purple neon sign with Japanese characters and English text TENGU
massive concrete overpass structure spanning the width of the road
tall buildings covered in illuminated advertisements and neon trim

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a brightly lit intersection dominated by a purple TENGU neon sign. The vehicle drives forward beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from open sky to the shadowed area beneath the highway structure. Sparse traffic moves ahead as the camera follows the car into the covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with red neon lighting

events.description: entering Little China district marked by on-screen text and red neon ambiance
approaching tunnel exit with increasing brightness from open street ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed underpass with rough concrete walls and red neon illumination

entered.detail: text overlay indicating Little China district with stylized font
rough textured concrete walls with industrial lighting fixtures
red illuminated architectural elements and signage along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a covered underpass marked as Little China, characterized by red neon lighting and rough concrete walls. The space is enclosed with no visible sky, creating an intimate corridor effect. The segment ends as the vehicle approaches the bright exit back into open city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown street canyon with holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting tunnel into wide open city canyon with towering buildings on both sides
stopping at red traffic light at pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: driving through wide city street and stopping at pedestrian crosswalk for red light

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along sidewalk near storefront entrance

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisements suspended between skyscrapers
skyscrapers with reflective glass surfaces and vertical neon lighting
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a vast urban canyon flanked by towering glass skyscrapers adorned with holographic billboards. The vehicle stops at a crosswalk while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The density of neon signage creates a vibrant, saturated atmosphere typical of the city's commercial core.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with curved architecture and large billboards

events.description: executing right turn at intersection onto commercial side street
passing from main avenue to narrower commercial street with storefronts

agents.ego_description: navigating right turn through intersection and driving past commercial storefronts and billboards

notable_agents.action: red car driving in the opposite direction on the adjacent lane

entered.detail: large purple illuminated billboard advertising Auto Corner with vehicle graphics
large pink billboard with Watson Whore text and show advertisement
rounded modern building with horizontal window strips and reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right onto a commercial street featuring prominent billboards including Auto Corner and Watson Whore advertisements. The architecture shifts to include curved glass buildings and ground-level storefronts. The camera captures the turn motion as the vehicle navigates through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage entrance with Japanese signage

events.description: entering underground parking garage with illuminated Japanese character signage
dimming ambient light as vehicle descends into enclosed garage structure

agents.ego_description: driving through intersection and descending into underground parking garage with concrete ramps

entered.detail: concrete structure with illuminated Japanese characters meaning peerless or unrivaled
concrete ramps and pillars leading to lower parking levels
large digital billboards showing product advertisements on garage walls

segments.scene_description: After navigating the commercial street, the vehicle approaches and enters an underground parking garage marked by large Japanese characters reading Tenka Musou. The environment shifts from open neon-lit streets to a dimly lit concrete structure with parking ramps and digital advertising screens on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with sound barriers and overhead gantry signs

events.description: exiting garage onto elevated highway with high concrete barriers
accelerating to higher speed on multi-lane highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating along multi-lane highway with high concrete barriers and overhead signage

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead in the same lane on the highway

entered.detail: tall concrete sound barriers with horizontal LED light strips
metal truss structures spanning the highway with attached billboards
smokestacks and high-rise buildings visible on the horizon with smoke plumes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the garage onto an elevated highway enclosed by high concrete barriers with integrated lighting. The camera captures the acceleration as the car moves along the multi-lane road, passing under overhead gantry signs and billboards. In the distance, industrial towers with smokestacks punctuate the skyline against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a neon-drenched metropolis, transitioning from open city intersections through enclosed tunnels and finally onto an elevated highway. It begins at a brightly lit intersection under a purple TENGU sign, moving forward as the vehicle slips beneath a massive concrete overpass into the shadowed, red-lit corridor of Little China. As the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a vast urban canyon of towering glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards before turning right onto a commercial street lined with curved architecture and vibrant advertisements. The environment then shifts from the open city air into the dimly lit concrete depths of a Tenka Musou parking garage, where digital screens flicker along the ramps. Finally, the camera captures the vehicle accelerating out of the garage and onto an elevated highway, passing under overhead gantries toward a distant skyline of industrial smokestacks.
